zh.lifeSummary: 當John Bruley於大約1383年出生在英國英格蘭奧可福爾時，他的父親William Bruley36歲，母親Agnes Bruley24歲。他於1395年與Matilda Quartermain在英國奧可福爾沃特斯東可結婚。他們至少是3個女兒的父母。他在英國奧可福爾沃特斯東可被列為squire 。他去世於1423年之前在他的家鄉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Bruley于大约1383年出生在英国英格兰奧可福爾时，他的父亲William Bruley36岁，母亲Agnes Bruley24岁。他于1395年与Matilda Quartermain在英国奧可福爾沃特斯東可结婚。他们至少是3个女儿的父母。他在英国奧可福爾沃特斯東可被列为squire 。他去世于1423年之前在他的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: Bruley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Altered form of French Brûlé (see Brule ). This surname is also found in Britain, where it is of Huguenot origin.

variants.name: Brule
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Fernand, Lucien, Andre, Laurent, Marcel, Monique, Normand, Phillippe, Pierre, Raoul, Yvan, Yves.

topographic name for someone living in a place cleared for use by burning, from brûlé ‘burnt’ (Old French bruslé, past participle of brusler ‘to burn’). Some instances of the name may derive from the same word used with reference to disfigurement by burning, either accidentally or as a medieval ordeal or punishment.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When John Bruley was born about 1383, in Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, William Bruley, was 36 and his mother, Agnes Bruley, was 24. He married Matilda Quartermain in 1395, in Waterstock, Oxfordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 daughters. His occupation is listed as squire  in Waterstock, Oxfordshire, England. He died before 1423, in his hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Bruley est né environ 1383, à Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Bruley, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Agnes Bruley, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Matilda Quartermain en 1395, à Waterstock, Oxfordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 filles. Sa profession de son indiquée est squire  à Waterstock, Oxfordshire, Angleterre. Il est décédé avant 1423, dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Bruley um 1383 in Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Bruley 36 und seine Mutter Agnes Bruley 24. Er hat 1395 in Waterstock, Oxfordshire, England Matilda Quartermain geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Töchter. sein Beruf ist als squire  in Waterstock, Oxfordshire, England aufgeführt. Er starb vor 1423 in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Bruley è nato il circa 1383 nel Oxfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, William Bruley, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Agnes Bruley, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Matilda Quartermain nel 1395, nel Waterstock, Oxfordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figlie. La sua occupazione è indicata come squire  nel Waterstock, Oxfordshire, England. Morì prima del 1423, nel sua cittadina.

ja.lifeSummary: John Bruleyが約1383年にイギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアで生まれた時，父William Bruleyは36歳，母Agnes Bruleyは24歳であった。1395年にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアワテルストックでMatilda Quartermainと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の娘の親であった。イギリスオクスフォードシュアイアワテルストックでの職業はsquire と記録されている。彼は1423年以前に故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Bruley(이)가 대략 1383년 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Bruley(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Bruley(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1395년 영국 스퍼드실르 왓르스톡에서 Matilda Quartermain(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그의 직업은 영국 스퍼드실르 왓르스톡에서 squire 이었다. 그는 1423년 이전 그의 고향에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Bruley nasceu aproximadamente 1383, em Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William Bruley, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Bruley, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Matilda Quartermain em 1395, em Waterstock, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhas. Sua profissão aparece como squire  em Waterstock, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu antes 1423, em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Bruley родился около 1383 г. в местности оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William Bruley было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Bruley, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Matilda Quartermain в 1395 г. в местности вэитирстокк, оксфордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 дочери.  Он работал по профессии squire  в местности вэитирстокк, оксфордшир, Англия. Он умер перед 1423 г. в его родном городе.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Bruley nació aproximadamente 1383, en Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William Bruley, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Agnes Bruley, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Matilda Quartermain en 1395, en Waterstock, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijas. Su ocupación registrada era squire  en Waterstock, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra. Murió antes de 1423, en su pueblo.
